title: SmallBoom fir gets Segmentation Fault when fed to firtool
body:
[first.fir.txt](https://github.com/llvm/circt/files/8646849/first.fir.txt)
```
$ firtool --format=fir -o=first.sv --verbose-pass-executions --strip-debug-info --mlir-pass-statistics --merge-connections-aggressive-merging --ignore-fir-locators --verify-each --remove-unused-ports first.fir
[firtool] Running fir parser
[firtool] -- Done in 1.915 sec
[firtool] Running "firrtl.circuit(firrtl.module(cse),firrtl-inject-dut-hier,firrtl.module(firrtl-lower-chirrtl),firrtl-infer-widths,firrtl-infer-resets,firrtl-dft,firrtl-prefix-modules,firrtl-lower-types{flatten-mem=false preserve-aggregate=false preserve-public-types=true},firrtl.module(firrtl-expand-whens,firrtl-remove-invalid,canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 region-simplify=true top-down=true},firrtl-infer-rw),firrtl-inliner,firrtl-imconstprop,firrtl-blackbox-reader{input-prefix=dgen},firrtl.module(canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 region-simplify=true top-down=true}),firrtl-remove-unused-ports,firrtl-emit-metadata{repl-seq-mem=false repl-seq-mem-circuit= repl-seq-mem-file=},firrtl-emit-omir{file=})"
[firtool]   Running "firrtl.module(cse)"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.541 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-inject-dut-hier"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl.module(firrtl-lower-chirrtl)"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.141 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-infer-widths"
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: firtool --format=fir -o=first.sv --verbose-pass-executions --strip-debug-info --mlir-pass-statistics --merge-connections-aggressive-merging --ignore-fir-locators --verify-each --remove-unused-ports first.fir
 #0 0x000000000047d1f4 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x47d1f4)
 #1 0x000000000047c130 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x47c130)
 #2 0x000000000047c91c SignalHandler(int) Signals.cpp:0:0
 #3 0x0000ffffb8ca985c (linux-vdso.so.1+0x85c)

#22 0x0000000000530edc (anonymous namespace)::InferWidthsPass::runOnOperation() InferWidths.cpp:0:0
#23 0x00000000006fbf00 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6fbf00)
#24 0x00000000006fbf7c mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(llvm::iterator_range<llvm::pointee_iterator<std::unique_ptr<mlir::Pass, std::default_delete<mlir::Pass> >*, mlir::Pass> >, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, mlir::PassInstrumentor*, mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const*) (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6fbf7c)
#25 0x00000000006fc364 auto mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runOnOperationAsyncImpl(bool)::'lambda'(auto&)::operator()<std::pair<mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager> >(auto&) const Pass.cpp:0:0
#26 0x00000000006fbb90 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runOnOperationAsyncImpl(bool) (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6fbb90)
#27 0x00000000006fbe7c mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6fbe7c)
#28 0x00000000006fbf7c mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(llvm::iterator_range<llvm::pointee_iterator<std::unique_ptr<mlir::Pass, std::default_delete<mlir::Pass> >*, mlir::Pass> >, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, mlir::PassInstrumentor*, mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const*) (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6fbf7c)
#29 0x00000000006fc240 mlir::PassManager::run(mlir::Operation*) (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6fc240)
#30 0x000000000045a810 processBuffer(mlir::MLIRContext&, mlir::TimingScope&, llvm::SourceMgr&, llvm::Optional<std::unique_ptr<llvm::ToolOutputFile, std::default_delete<llvm::ToolOutputFile> > >&) firtool.cpp:0:0
#31 0x000000000045ac44 processInputSplit(mlir::MLIRContext&, mlir::TimingScope&, std::unique_ptr<llvm::MemoryBuffer, std::default_delete<llvm::MemoryBuffer> >, llvm::Optional<std::unique_ptr<llvm::ToolOutputFile, std::default_delete<llvm::ToolOutputFile> > >&) firtool.cpp:0:0
#32 0x0000000000457894 main (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x457894)
#33 0x0000ffffb87b5d64 __libc_start_main (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x1fd64)
#34 0x0000000000457b50 _start (/media/myhd/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x457b50)
Segmentation fault
```
The attached file first.fir.txt is a file in fir format but inorder for github to allow it to be attached to issue the txt extension has been added
The above fir is generated using SmallBoom Config from chipyard
I am able to generate verilog using firtool for RocketConfig from chipyard
